### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containerd/platforms (github.com/containerd/platforms)</summary>

### [`v1.0.0-rc.4`](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/releases/tag/v1.0.0-rc.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/compare/v1.0.0-rc.3...v1.0.0-rc.4)

#### What's Changed

- refactor, optimize FormatAll, ParseAll by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​30](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/30)
- Strip the win32k when comparing windows platforms by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​31](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/31)
- Add OnlyOS function allow matching any architecture by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​33](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/33)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containerd/platforms/compare/v1.0.0-rc.3...v1.0.0-rc.4>

</details>
